overrides.@types/multer: Depends on @types/express@* which would resolve to the v4 types; pin to v5 so it matches the express-5 backend and doesn't reintroduce the removed `req.param` Request type.
overrides.postcss: Next 16 still bundles postcss 8.4.31 (moderate XSS advisory GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93). Pin to the patched 8.5.x — a same-major bump Next tolerates — instead of npm's absurd 'fix' of downgrading Next to 9.x. No --force/--legacy-peer-deps needed.
